# SOLARA — Electronic Music Producer & DJ

## About
SOLARA is a Dubai-based electronic music producer and DJ specializing in deep house, melodic techno, and Afro-house fusion. Blending Middle Eastern textures with global dance music.

## Services
- Festival performances
- Club residencies
- Private event DJ sets
- Brand partnerships & activations
- Studio collaborations

## Releases
- MIRAGE EP (2026) — Afterlife Records
- Nocturne Single (2025) — Anjunadeep
- Dusk to Dawn Album (2025) — Afterlife Records

## Contact
- Booking: booking@solara-music.com
- Press: press@solara-music.com
- Management: Nour Collective, Dubai
- Website: https://solara-music.vercel.app
